interpretation: Poor - not recommended to harvest this week
advice: Don't harvest your rice this week, as it's not yet ready. Wait for the rain to stop and the moisture to decrease, as high humidity can damage the crop. This week, watch out for too much rain, which can ruin your rice, and check the weather forecast before harvesting. When you do harvest, dry the rice properly and store it in a dry, well-ventilated place to keep it safe from mold and damage.
